allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: redesign sidebar with modern professional look

- Add gradient background with subtle shadow
- Implement vertical accent bar for active navigation items
- Improve tooltips with elegant dark styling and animations
- Enhance user profile section with gradient avatar and role display
- Add smooth hover animations with icon scaling
- Improve section labels for Admin and Consultant areas
- Widen sidebar for better readability \(256px expanded, 72px collapsed\)
- Add expand/collapse toggle at bottom when collapsed
- Improve mobile drawer with backdrop blur effect

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
